touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Rowan Osei introducing AskElephant's CRM automation capabilities. No response received.
LinkedIn connection request and message sent highlighting mutual connections in the CS space. No response received.
Follow-up email with case study of similar-sized SaaS company automating customer success workflows. No response received.
Cold call attempt, left voicemail briefly introducing AskElephant and offering to share ROI calculator. No callback received.
Fifth outreach email with personalized video walkthrough of specific CRM automation use case. Rowan replied expressing interest in learning more about reducing manual data entry for the CS team.

questions_asked.question: Does your platform integrate with our existing CRM setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs and can typically get you up and running within a week.

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute qualification call with Rowan. Discussed current pain points around manual CRM data entry consuming 8-10 hours per week for the CS team. Rowan mentioned they've been handling this internally but it's becoming unsustainable as they scale. No formal evaluation of other tools yet. Confirmed budget authority sits with CEO but Rowan can influence the decision.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We're planning to expand our customer base by 40% this quarter and our current manual processes won't scale.

questions_asked.question: What kind of timeline are we looking at for implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can typically have you fully onboarded within 2-3 weeks depending on your specific requirements.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email recapping qualification call and confirming demo scheduled. Shared preliminary pricing framework and ROI calculator showing potential 12-hour weekly time savings for the CS team.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller seat count and expand later?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, our pricing is flexible and you can add seats as needed.

next_steps: Prepare custom demo focusing on CS workflows

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute product demo focused on CRM automation workflows for customer success. Rowan was engaged and asked detailed questions about specific automation rules and reporting capabilities. Expressed enthusiasm about the potential time savings. Mentioned that the CEO is generally supportive but hasn't been directly involved yet. Rowan noted budget is tight this quarter.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation rules for our specific workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, the platform is fully configurable and we include consulting hours to help you set up custom rules.

questions_asked.question: When would you ideally want to have this up and running?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within the next 4-6 weeks before our busy season hits.

questions_asked.question: What does the consulting package include?
questions_asked.answer: It includes 10 hours of dedicated implementation support and ongoing access to our customer success team.

objections: Need to keep costs down given our current budget constraints
next_steps: Loop in CEO for quick intro

touches.ai_summary: Sent formal proposal for 7 seats with automations plus consulting package at $7,400 ACV. Rowan responded asking if there's flexibility on pricing given their budget situation. Mentioned the CEO is aware but hasn't reviewed the proposal yet.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to work on the pricing to fit our Q2 budget?
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what I can do. I'll need to understand your specific constraints to make the business case internally.

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation email offering revised pricing at $4,200 ACV (43% discount) to fit within EchoExchange's budget. Rowan confirmed this works and said they can move forward. Still working to get CEO approval on the contract but feels confident it will go through. Asked to expedite paperwork to hit end of quarter.
next_steps: Request CEO intro for final approval
